title: croton ovalifolius var. nummularius
intro: Croton ovalifolius var. nummularius, also known as the coin-leaf or coin-shaped croton, is a variety of shrub native to tropical Asia, characterized by its unique, coin-shaped leaves. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Croton ovalifolius var. nummularius include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and protect against certain diseases. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine as a treatment for various ailments.
